summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: three BLUE house icons (Square + roof Polygon) on top row, three colored utility Circles (YELLOW water / TEAL gas / ORANGE electricity) on bottom row. LaggedStart draws all 9 Lines of the complete bipartite K_{3,3}. LEFT panel: V=6, E=9. RIGHT panel: progressive argument 'planar ⇒ F = 5; bipartite ⇒ every face ≥4 edges; 2E ≥ 4F ⇒ E ≥ 10; but E = 9 — contradiction', escalated YELLOW→RED.
